title: Final ESR Findings (report 05)
description: The host model writes internal/esr-findings.json; build_report.py renders it to 05_Final_ESR.pdf. The Final ESR is concise, evaluator-style, and bullet-structured. It evaluates the proposal as submitted and MUST NOT contain rewriting suggestions, replacement text, or suggested improvements.

criteria.description: One entry per criterion, in order: Excellence, Impact, Implementation.

score.description: Official criterion score, 0.0–5.0. Finer increments than 0.5 are allowed (e.g. 4.7); not restricted to half-points. Holistic HE-ESR judgment against the criterion's Core Evaluation Expectations and the General Scoring Logic bands (ESR_WRITING_RULES.md §1A/§5): proposal↔call fit and whether the core substance is present and credible — not a tally of checkpoint statuses. Bonus/presentational gaps and ambition do not lower the score.

assessment.description: PRIMARY: the criterion assessment as a sequence of flowing EC-referee prose paragraphs (not bullets), in the style of an official Evaluation Summary Report. Must cover every aspect of the criterion (see the standard 'aspects taken into account'), weave strengths and weaknesses, and tag each judgement with a severity phrase where relevant ('This is very positive.' / '... a minor shortcoming.' / '... a shortcoming.' / '... a significant (important) shortcoming.' / '... a serious shortcoming.'). Moderate length — more than a one-line comment, less than the internal reports 01–04. No rewriting suggestions.

strengths.description: LEGACY (pre-prose): most important criterion-level strengths, as short bullets. Rendered only if `assessment` is absent.

weaknesses.description: LEGACY (pre-prose): most important criterion-level weaknesses, as short bullets. Rendered only if `assessment` is absent.

evaluator_comment.description: LEGACY (pre-prose): concise evaluator-style comment. Rendered only if `assessment` is absent.

comment.description: LEGACY: flat evaluator-style paragraph. Rendered only if `assessment` and the bullet fields are absent.

total_score.description: Total across the three criteria, /15.0. If omitted, the renderer sums the criterion scores.

overall.description: Concise overall assessment as bullets (list) or a single string (legacy).
